message:
feat(fcp-store): add quarantine promotion validation and benchmarks (1n78.15)

Per FCP Specification §8.4.1, add promotion validation logic:
- Add PromotionReason enum with three valid promotion types:
  - ReachableFromCheckpoint (object reached from zone checkpoint)
  - AuthenticatedPeerRequest (explicit peer request with token)
  - LocalPin (local user/policy action)
- Add promote() method with validation enforcement
- Add validate_promotion_reason() for promotion rule checking

Add adversarial tests for quarantine:
- Rapid quota exhaustion attempts
- Large object injection attacks
- Promotion without valid reason
- Promotion of non-quarantined objects

Add criterion benchmarks for symbol store operations:
- put_symbol throughput at various symbol sizes
- get_symbol lookup performance
- get_all_symbols bulk read
- can_reconstruct check
- get_distribution (coverage evaluation)
- list_zone enumeration

Also includes clippy fixes for repair.rs test functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
